title: A Birthday-Wish
content:
Who know thee, love: thy life be such
        That, ere the year be o'er,
    Each one who loves thee now so much,
        Even God, may love thee more!
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Birthday-Wish"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
